title: Knowledge / RAG plugin config
description: Schema-validated, config-driven knobs for the knowledge plugin (plugin-architecture.md §11). Defaults here are the effective values the Loader hands the plugin via ctx.config; full value-validation runs in CI (scripts/check_manifests.py).

top_k.description: How many chunks retrieval returns for an answer/search.

min_score.description: Drop retrieved chunks below this cosine score (0 = keep all).
